Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.tests

Class TrackedPredicateTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.tests.AbstractTransformerTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.tests.TrackedPredicateTests
public class TrackedPredicateTests extends AbstractTransformerTests
Unit tests for interface ITrackedPredicate.
